title: MUSIC VIDEO A — celebration walk home, Eva carrying Ginger
prompt: Multi-shot composition. Music-video block A — designed to LOOP cleanly. Composition anchored on pre-rendered Pattern E group still (image-to-video reference). Motion-only prompt — Suno song mp3 will be overlaid in post; no specific lip-sync. Locked formation — no character separates, no character changes positions.

Shot 1 (0-5s, slow tracking shot eye-level alongside the family, hold on Pattern E group still anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip19-group
Hold the Pattern E group still composition while tracking softly alongside on the leaf-strewn sidewalk: Sara center-left walking softly beside Eva, candy bucket in left hand and Joe's blue leash gently in right; Eva center-right cradling Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape; Joe trotting softly beside Sara on all four paws with blue collar visible, tail wagging softly; Papa behind-left carrying both pumpkin candy buckets one in each hand, shoulders softly bouncing to music; Mama behind-right beside Papa with flashlight at her side, right hand softly raised to chest in a 'we did it' gesture, beaming. Eva softly nuzzles her cheek to Ginger's head; Ginger's tail wags softly from inside the cape; Joe's tail wags; group hums softly with gentle smiles.

Shot 2 (5-10s, slow tracking shot eye-level, continuing alongside the family — same Pattern E anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip19-group
Locked formation continues. Sara turns her face softly toward Eva and Ginger with a warm big-sister smile then forward; Papa softly tilts his head toward Mama with a warm dad-grin then forward; Mama softly turns her face toward Papa then forward. Soft fall leaves drift gently in the background; soft warm porch lights twinkle softly from neighboring houses. Loop point matches opening frame — designed to loop.

Lighting: soft warm porch lights drifting from neighboring houses, soft Halloween-night ambience, gentle 'we found her' family-glow.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, kid-show music-video.
cameraStyle: slow tracking shot alongside the family in locked formation, designed to loop cleanly
closingFrame: Tracking-shot composition at @front_fence_sidewalk — @Papa behind-left carrying both pumpkin candy buckets; @Mama behind-right with flashlight at side, right hand at chest in 'we did it' gesture; @Sara center-left holding @Joe's leash in right hand and candy bucket in left; @Eva center-right cradling @Ginger wrapped in pumpkin cape; @Joe trotting softly on all four paws beside Sara in bug costume, tail mid-wag; soft warm porch lights drifting from neighboring houses; loop point matches opening frame.
